---
pagetitle: "Michał Adamczyk — Advanced Analytics, AI & Consulting"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>
      /* --- strip Quarto chrome on the landing page only --- */
      .navbar, #quarto-header, .nav-footer, footer.footer, #quarto-back-to-top,
      #quarto-announcement, #title-block-header { display:none !important; }
      .page-columns{ display:block !important; }
      .quarto-container, #quarto-content, .content,
      #quarto-content > main, #quarto-document-content, main.content, body main{
        max-width:none !important; padding:0 !important; margin:0 !important; width:100% !important;
      }
      *{ box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
      html,body{ height:100%; }
      body{ overflow-x:hidden; min-height:100vh; padding-top:0 !important; }

      .topnav{position:relative;z-index:3;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
          padding:24px clamp(20px,6vw,72px);}
      .brand{font-family:"Space Grotesk";font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.01em;font-size:1.05rem;
          color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none}
      .brand .dot{color:var(--site-accent)}
      .navlinks{display:flex;gap:26px;align-items:center}
      .navlinks a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:500;transition:color .2s}
      .navlinks a:hover{color:var(--ink)}
      .navlinks a.gh{font-size:1.2rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center}

      .wrap{position:relative;z-index:2;min-height:calc(100vh - 84px);
            display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:clamp(28px,4vw,64px);align-items:center;
            padding:20px clamp(20px,6vw,72px) 60px; max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto}

      .avail{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;text-decoration:none;
        font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
        color:var(--site-accent);margin-bottom:24px;transition:color .2s}
      .avail:hover{color:#9fe3ff}
      .avail .ping{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#34d399;flex:0 0 auto;
        box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,211,153,.6);animation:ping 1.9s infinite}
      @keyframes ping{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,211,153,.5)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(52,211,153,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,211,153,0)}}

      .hero h1{font-family:"Space Grotesk";font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.03em;
         font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5.6vw,4.8rem);line-height:.99;margin-bottom:24px;color:var(--ink)}
      .hero h1 .grad{background:linear-gradient(100deg,var(--site-accent),var(--accent2));
         -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent}
      .lead{max-width:540px;font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.6vw,1.2rem);line-height:1.6;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:34px}
      .cta{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
      .cta .btn{font:inherit;font-weight:600;font-size:.96rem;padding:13px 22px;border-radius:12px;
           text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;transition:.2s;border:1px solid transparent}
      .cta .primary{background:linear-gradient(100deg,var(--site-accent),var(--accent2));color:#06101f;
           box-shadow:0 10px 30px -8px rgba(56,189,248,.55)}
      .cta .primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 16px 40px -8px rgba(56,189,248,.7)}
      .cta .ghost{border-color:rgba(159,176,207,.3);color:var(--ink)}
      .cta .ghost:hover{border-color:var(--site-accent);background:rgba(56,189,248,.08)}

      .stats{display:flex;gap:36px;margin-top:46px;flex-wrap:wrap}
      .stat .n{font-family:"Space Grotesk";font-weight:700;font-size:1.7rem;
         background:linear-gradient(100deg,var(--site-accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent}
      .stat .l{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.03em;margin-top:3px}

      .panel{background:rgba(12,19,38,.55);border:1px solid rgba(159,176,207,.16);border-radius:18px;
             padding:20px 20px 14px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
             box-shadow:0 30px 70px -34px rgba(0,0,0,.8), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
      .panel .cap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:4px}
      .panel .cap b{font-family:"JetBrains Mono";font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500}
      .panel .cap .tag{font-family:"JetBrains Mono";font-size:.72rem;color:var(--site-accent);background:rgba(56,189,248,.12);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px}
      .panel svg{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
      .axis{stroke:rgba(159,176,207,.25);stroke-width:1}
      .gridln{stroke:rgba(159,176,207,.08);stroke-width:1}
      #nowdot{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(56,189,248,.95));animation:pdot 1.6s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes pdot{0%,100%{r:3.6}50%{r:6}}
      .legend{display:flex;gap:18px;margin-top:8px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono";font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted)}
      .legend i{font-style:normal;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
      .sw{width:14px;height:0;border-top:2px solid var(--site-accent)}
      .sw.dash{border-top:2px dashed #c7d2fe}
      .sw.band{height:10px;border:0;background:rgba(56,189,248,.18);border-radius:2px}

      @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .avail .ping,#nowdot{animation:none} }
      @media(max-width:900px){.wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px}.panel{order:2}.stats{margin-top:30px}}
    </style>
---

```{=html}
<nav class="topnav">
  <a class="brand" href="index.html">Michał Adamczyk<span class="dot">.</span></a>
  <div class="navlinks">
    <a href="portfolio.html">Portfolio</a>
    <a href="blog.html">Writing</a>
    <a href="about.html">About</a>
    <a href="contact.html">Contact</a>
    <a class="gh" href="https://github.com/MichalDataSc/portfolio" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="wrap hero">
  <div>
    <a class="avail" href="contact.html"><span class="ping"></span>Available for advanced analytics, AI &amp; consulting</a>
    <h1>Turning data into<br><span class="grad">decisions &amp; profit.</span></h1>
    <p class="lead">Senior data scientist and ex-BCG consultant with close to a decade
       building advanced analytics and AI systems in production — and the strategy
       thinking to know which problems are worth solving.</p>
    <div class="cta">
      <a class="btn primary" href="contact.html">Get in touch →</a>
      <a class="btn ghost" href="portfolio.html">Project portfolio</a>
      <a class="btn ghost" href="about.html">About me</a>
      <a class="btn ghost" href="blog.html">Read the articles</a>
    </div>
    <div class="stats">
      <div class="stat"><div class="n">~10 yrs</div><div class="l">Analytics, AI &amp; consulting</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="n">ex-BCG</div><div class="l">Strategy pedigree</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="n">Kaggle</div><div class="l">Competition Expert</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="panel">
    <div class="cap"><b>fig. data → decision → profit</b></div>
    <div class="cv" id="herochart" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
(() => {
  const NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  const eln=(t,a)=>{const e=document.createElementNS(NS,t);for(const k in a)e.setAttribute(k,a[k]);return e;};
  const host=document.getElementById('herochart'); if(!host) return;
  const s=eln('svg',{viewBox:'0 0 460 290',width:'100%'}); host.appendChild(s);
  const defs=eln('defs',{}); s.appendChild(defs);
  const reduce=matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  const steps=['data','model','decision','profit'], hx=[70,160,250,340], hy=28;
  s.appendChild(eln('line',{x1:hx[0],y1:hy,x2:hx[3],y2:hy,stroke:'rgba(159,176,207,.2)','stroke-width':1.5}));
  const stepEls=steps.map((lab,i)=>{
    const dot=eln('circle',{cx:hx[i],cy:hy,r:5,fill:'rgba(159,176,207,.3)'}); s.appendChild(dot);
    const t=eln('text',{x:hx[i],y:hy-12,'text-anchor':'middle',fill:'rgba(159,176,207,.45)','font-family':'JetBrains Mono, monospace','font-size':10}); t.textContent=lab; s.appendChild(t);
    if(i<3){const ar=eln('text',{x:(hx[i]+hx[i+1])/2,y:hy+4,'text-anchor':'middle',fill:'rgba(159,176,207,.35)','font-family':'JetBrains Mono, monospace','font-size':11}); ar.textContent='→'; s.appendChild(ar);}
    return {dot,t};
  });
  const setActive=idx=>stepEls.forEach((e,i)=>{const done=i<idx,act=i===idx;
    e.dot.setAttribute('fill',act?'#9fe3ff':(done?'rgba(56,189,248,.7)':'rgba(159,176,207,.3)'));
    e.dot.setAttribute('r',act?6.5:5);
    e.t.setAttribute('fill',act?'#9fe3ff':(done?'rgba(56,189,248,.7)':'rgba(159,176,207,.45)'));});

  const X0=52,X1=430,Y0=258,Y1=66;
  s.appendChild(eln('rect',{x:X0-8,y:Y1-6,width:X1-X0+16,height:Y0-Y1+14,rx:10,fill:'none',stroke:'rgba(159,176,207,.1)'}));
  const cp=eln('clipPath',{id:'heroclip'}); cp.appendChild(eln('rect',{x:X0-8,y:Y1-6,width:X1-X0+16,height:Y0-Y1+14})); defs.appendChild(cp);
  const boundary=eln('line',{stroke:'#c7d2fe','stroke-width':2,'stroke-linecap':'round',opacity:0,'clip-path':'url(#heroclip)'}); s.appendChild(boundary);
  const pg=eln('g',{}); s.appendChild(pg);
  const counter=eln('text',{x:358,y:32,fill:'#9fe3ff','font-family':'Space Grotesk, sans-serif','font-size':15,'font-weight':700,opacity:0}); s.appendChild(counter);

  let pts=[],theta=0,target=0,cx0=0,cy0=0,mA={x:0,y:0},total=0,k=0;
  function gen(){
    while(pg.firstChild)pg.removeChild(pg.firstChild); pts=[]; total=0;
    mA={x:X0+(X1-X0)*(0.58+Math.random()*0.12),y:Y1+(Y0-Y1)*(0.22+Math.random()*0.16)};
    const mB={x:X0+(X1-X0)*(0.3+Math.random()*0.12),y:Y1+(Y0-Y1)*(0.6+Math.random()*0.16)};
    const blob=(m,cls,n)=>{for(let i=0;i<n;i++){
      const x=Math.max(X0+6,Math.min(X1-6,m.x+(Math.random()+Math.random()-1)*72));
      const y=Math.max(Y1+6,Math.min(Y0-6,m.y+(Math.random()+Math.random()-1)*52));
      const c=eln('circle',{cx:x,cy:y,r:0,fill:'rgba(159,176,207,.45)'}); pg.appendChild(c);
      pts.push({x,y,cls,c,val:60+Math.random()*340,ring:null});}};
    blob(mA,1,16); blob(mB,0,16);
    cx0=(mA.x+mB.x)/2; cy0=(mA.y+mB.y)/2;
    target=Math.atan2(mA.y-mB.y,mA.x-mB.x)+Math.PI/2;
    theta=target+1.2*(Math.random()<0.5?1:-1);
  }
  gen();
  const T_DATA=80,T_MODEL=195,T_DEC=300,T_END=450;
  function f(){
    k++;
    const phase=k<T_DATA?0:k<T_MODEL?1:k<T_DEC?2:3;
    setActive(phase);
    pts.forEach((p,i)=>{const a=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,(k-i*1.5)/26)); if(phase===0||k<T_DATA+40)p.c.setAttribute('r',a*4.4);});
    const nx=-Math.sin(theta),ny=Math.cos(theta);
    const aSide=((mA.x-cx0)*nx+(mA.y-cy0)*ny)>0?1:0;
    if(phase>=1){theta+=(target-theta)*0.06;
      const dx=Math.cos(theta)*480,dy=Math.sin(theta)*480;
      boundary.setAttribute('x1',cx0-dx);boundary.setAttribute('y1',cy0-dy);boundary.setAttribute('x2',cx0+dx);boundary.setAttribute('y2',cy0+dy);
      boundary.setAttribute('opacity',Math.min(0.9,(k-T_DATA)/30));}
    else boundary.setAttribute('opacity',0);
    pts.forEach(p=>{const side=((p.x-cx0)*nx+(p.y-cy0)*ny)>0?1:0,good=side===aSide;
      if(phase===0)p.c.setAttribute('fill','rgba(159,176,207,.45)');
      else if(phase===1)p.c.setAttribute('fill',good?'rgba(56,189,248,.6)':'rgba(159,176,207,.4)');
      else{ if(good){p.c.setAttribute('fill','rgba(56,189,248,.95)');
          if(!p.ring){p.ring=eln('circle',{cx:p.x,cy:p.y,r:7,fill:'none',stroke:'#9fe3ff','stroke-width':1.2,opacity:0}); pg.appendChild(p.ring);}}
        else p.c.setAttribute('fill',phase===3?'rgba(159,176,207,.16)':'rgba(159,176,207,.3)');}});
    if(phase===2){const pr=(k-T_MODEL)/(T_DEC-T_MODEL);
      pts.forEach(p=>{if(p.ring){p.ring.setAttribute('opacity',Math.min(1,pr*1.6));p.ring.setAttribute('r',7+Math.sin(k*0.2)*1.3);}});}
    if(phase===3){
      if(total===0)total=100000+Math.random()*1000000;
      const pr=Math.min(1,(k-T_DEC)/70);
      counter.setAttribute('opacity',1); counter.textContent='$'+Math.round(total*pr).toLocaleString();}
    else counter.setAttribute('opacity',0);
    if(k>=T_END){k=0;gen();}
    if(!reduce) requestAnimationFrame(f);
  }
  if(reduce){theta=target; k=T_DEC+72; pts.forEach(p=>p.c.setAttribute('r',4.4));}
  f();
})();
</script>
```
